section: 2.2: Barbarian fishing, Green dragons and the Hallowed Sepulchre
stepText: Start Lunar Diplomacy and continue the quest until you have to use your dramen staff on the elemental altars to make a lunar staff (optional: make more than one lunar staff for cosmetic purposes). While on the Lady Zay, collect at least 45 swamp tar. Remember to do your hourlies and grow cats whenever convenient.
itemsNeeded: tinderbox, bullseye lantern (might still be a sapphire lantern from Tears of Guthix, just swap it out), melee gear, swordfish, energy potions, prayer potions, clean guam, clean marrentill, pestle and mortar, dramen staff

unresolvedItems.rawToken: bullseye lantern (might still be a sapphire lantern from Tears of Guthix, just swap it out)
